referential_task.4.player.partner_human_: They sounded like they were real. They communicated very human-like. I would be shocked if they were AI.

participant.partner_comment: I absolutely loved my partner. Legend, we came up with nicknames and we solved it very fast. Great guy/girl
participant.partner_human_vs_ai_why: Has to be human because I was laughing at times, making jokes and an AI wouldnt be able to understand that. Or some of the hints I was giving or nicknames
